title: I Release Hoarding and Allow Continuous Flow
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the grip of financial clinging
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement for when you are holding money tighter than circumstances require. The release names the hoarding impulse (the brace-for-drought pattern) and the allow opens to money as a continuous, replenishing current.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 61 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for the hoarding pattern. Hoarding is not always about large sums. It shows up as delaying a sensible purchase, refusing a reasonable expense, keeping money in limbo rather than putting it to work. This practice releases the grip and opens to a different relationship with money's movement.
I am ready to release all hoarding, all clinging, and all fear that money once spent will not return. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow continuous flow: money that moves freely, returns steadily, and grows as it circulates. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 61 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
